parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message: "Feedback processed. Weeks updated and ready for review." }) }}

values.content:
=You are an expert educational analyst. A lecturer submitted weekly feedback   
  about their teaching experience.
                                                                                
  Course ID: {{ $('Webhook - Weekly Feedback').item.json.body.course_id }}
  Week: {{ $('Webhook - Weekly Feedback').item.json.body.week_number }}
  Lecturer Reflection: {{ $json.body.reflection_text }}

  Analyze this feedback and extract key issues. Return ONLY a raw JSON object
  with no markdown:
  {
    "concept_struggles": ["string - concepts students found difficult"],
    "timing_issues": ["string - pacing or time management problems"],
    "engagement_notes": ["string - what worked or did not work for engagement"],
    "suggestions": ["string - lecturer suggestions for improvement"],
    "affected_weeks": [5, 6, 7]
  }

  Rules:
  - Each array must have 1 to 4 items
  - affected_weeks must list week numbers AFTER the current week that need
  adjustment based on the feedback
  - Do not use apostrophes or contractions
  - Output must be parseable by JSON.parse()

= You are an expert curriculum designer. Regenerate the teaching content for
  week {{ $json.week_number }}.

  Current issues to address:
  - Teaching notes: {{ $json.teaching_notes }}
  - Discussion prompts: {{ JSON.stringify($json.discussion_prompts) }}

  Expand and improve this content. Return ONLY a raw JSON object with no
  markdown:
  {
    "week_number": {{ $json.week_number }},
    "teaching_notes": "string - comprehensive 2-3 paragraph teaching strategy
  with timing breakdown, engagement techniques, real-world examples, and how to
  address student struggles",
    "discussion_prompts": ["string", "string", "string"],
    "activity_ideas": ["string - detailed activity with step-by-step
  instructions", "string", "string"]
  }

  Rules:
  - teaching_notes must be detailed and actionable for the lecturer
  - Do not use apostrophes or contractions
  - Output must be parseable by JSON.parse()

= You are an expert curriculum advisor. Based on lecturer feedback from week {{
  $('Webhook - Weekly Feedback').item.json.body.week_number }}, generate updated
   content for the affected weeks.

  Feedback issues identified:
 {{ $('extract issues').first().json.content.parts[0].text }} 
  Course ID: {{ $('Webhook - Weekly Feedback').item.json.body.course_id }}

  Generate adjusted content for each affected week. Return ONLY a raw JSON array
   with no markdown:
  [
    {
      "week_number": 5,
      "teaching_notes": "string - updated detailed teaching strategy addressing
  the feedback issues, including how to adjust delivery, what to reinforce, and
  how to handle student struggles",
      "discussion_prompts": ["string - updated discussion question", "string",
  "string"],
      "activity_ideas": ["string - specific activity addressing the feedback",
  "string"]
    }
  ]

  Rules:
  - Only include weeks that genuinely need changes based on the feedback
  - teaching_notes must directly address the issues raised in the feedback
  - discussion_prompts must have 3 to 5 items per week
  - activity_ideas must have 2 to 3 items per week
  - Do not use apostrophes or contractions
  - Output must be parseable by JSON.parse()
